Document:
# Welcome to the Triad Sector.
You wake up in this land, tattered from years and years of war.. No matter your background, things are very different from traditional SS14 lore:
- [bold]Nanotrasen is destroyed. - [bold]The Syndicate is shattered. - [bold]It has been centuries since the [textlink="Corporate War" link="CorporateWar"] that started this all.[/bold]
The following sections contain important context to the story of the world you find yourself in. [color=red][bold]It is highly recommended you at least read the content in this primer.[/bold][/red]
# The 50-year War In 2772, almost 150 years after the [textlink="Corporate War" link="CorporateWar"], the locals of the Triad sector had a major conflict with their government, known as [color=orange]The Imperial Coalition (TIC)[/color]. This conflict was sparked from the coalition's style of iron-fisted rule and their aggressive ways against anyone that dared spoke against the [color=orange]TIC[/color]. The conflict put massive strain on the economy of Triad, which caused interlopers such as the [color=cyan]Solarian Directives[/color] to take advantage of the coalition's weakening grip on the sector. Eventually, conflict and war crimes from these two factions escalated into a three-way war after the locals of Triad rebelled against their coalition and the Solarian interlopers, birthing the [color=lightblue]Civilian Defense Force (CDF)[/color].
In a desperate attempt to end the conflict, the [color=lightblue]CDF[/color] launched an attack against the [color=cyan]Solarian Directive[/color]'s cargo vessels, causing a hit to be placed on the [color=lightblue]CDF[/color] leader. Months later, the [color=lightblue]CDF[/color] makes a fatal mistake, attacking the [color=orange]TIC[/color]'s mining station. A [color=cyan]SD[/color] stealth ship in the area followed the [color=lightblue]CDF[/color] fleet back to the base of operations, exposing their location. This resulted in the [color=cyan]SD[/color] launching an attack on the [color=lightblue]CDF[/color] base of operations, using orbital bombardments to turn it into nothing but a crater. Unfortunately for the [color=cyan]Solarian Directive[/color], the spirit of the [color=lightblue]CDF[/color] remained unbroke, the attack invigorating the [color=lightblue]CDF[/color] further to fanatically drive out the two factions out of the sector.
Finally in 2823, Triad gained its independence as the two factions retreated, and with that, the [color=lightblue]CDF[/color] rebranded as the [color=#FFD580]Triad Defense Force (TDF)[/color], vowing to protect the sector from any and all threats.
# Current Day It is now 2828, Triad still recovering from the ashes that the war brought upon them. With civilization starting to rebuild, endevorous companies and other groups are taking interest in the sector, hoping to colonize or make a profit. This caused Triad's economy to start to get back on its feet. Though, this attention does not come without its banes, as the [color=cyan]Solarian Directive[/color] and [color=orange]Imperial Coalition[/color] are back, the two factions in a cold-war of sorts tension with eachother as they both wait for the perfect moment to retake the sector, with the [color=#FFD580]TDF[/color] weary as ever as reports of their previous adversaries' return flow in.
# The Monolith
You, and everyone else here, are within the influence of a mythical anomalous region commonly referred to as "The Monolith". This region encompasses what is known in common starmaps as [color=orange]the Triad sector[/color], on the fringe of civilized space in the Perseus arm. "The Monolith" causes many strange phenomena, including (but not limited to) sentient fleshbeasts, highly advanced automated killing machines, mysterious forms of matter, and Blue Lobsters, almost all of which will cause a quick demise to the unprepared explorer. It also creates significant interference at the fringes of space - Those who enter the Triad sector often are unable to leave.
Not much is known about the Monolith zone, but since its discovery it has caused significant scientific intrigue attracting many different people like a second Great Expansion.
# Major Factions
- [textlink="The Triad Defense Force (TDF)" link="TriadDefenseForce"]
- [textlink="The Triad Frontier Association (TFA)" link="TriadFrontierAssociation"]
- [textlink="The Solarian Directive (SD)" link="SolarianDirective"]
- [textlink="The Imperial Coalition (TIC)" link="ImperialCoalition"]
# Full Timeline - [textlink="Timeline of Triad Sector's history" link="Timeline"]
